subcodes.first_line: In this day, from the rustling of the Divine Lote-Tree, in its most exalted station, this most sublime Word is heard: "Look not..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز از حفیف سدره منتهی در رتبه اولی اینکلمه علیا اصغا میشود لاتنظروا الی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @love of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
